name: rule-of-thirds
_note: M6 fixture — exercises the absolute-timestamp overlay path. Production Rule of Thirds uses grid_highlight_windows at fixed timestamps (e.g. [1.4-1.7s], [2.4-2.7s]); this stripped fixture is 3 slots hard-cut with two text_overlays carrying absolute start/end so the abs PNG/ASS generation pipeline fires. The actual highlight rendering relies on real clip metadata via _resolve_overlay_text; until the orchestrator integration tests stub that out, parity coverage depends on a real clip set staged in PARITY_CLIPS_DIR.
